title: Complete Records Collection or something for 20 announced
display_title: Complete Records Collection or something for 20 announced
wikitext:
[]: Complete Records Collection (or something) for 2.0 announced             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu May 13, 2010 3:19 pm Min nano EVA FAN-post link Coming this summer, this book will have it all! Production notes, various drawnigs (stroyboards, mechanical desgins, etc.), images made from film cels, interviews and whatnot. Also, here is something concerning Q (something about the trailer at the end of 2.0): 『Q』次回予告を含む本編の全カット・全台詞を掲載した「フィルムストーリー」 Could someone translate?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu May 13, 2010 5:16 pm Google translated works perfectly well for most of the details. Already chatter about this on irc a bit, but everyone too lazy to make a news post. Personally, I'm fapping hard while thinking of where to get the 12,000 yen and probably 7,000-8,000 yen shipping.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu May 13, 2010 8:03 pm Very interesting development indeed, but to be expected right from the start. I already have the Evangelion 1.0 Complete works book set and intend to save up for this one. I just have to wonder though.....do i really want to pay more than 200 dollars US for this 2.0 book set? I got lucky last time when i bought the 1.0 complete works set for only $100 including shipping.....

[]: Re: Complete Records Collection (or something) for 2.0 annou             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Thu May 13, 2010 10:06 pm SaltyJoe wrote: Also, here is something concerning Q (something about the trailer at the end of 2.0): 『Q』次回予告を含む本編の全カット・全台詞を掲載した「フィルムストーリー」 Could someone translate?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri May 14, 2010 8:34 am ^ Thanks. Eh, i was simply asking for a precise (not Google Translate's "Story cut stuff ZA WARUDO") translation of the line because i foolishly hoped that there might be some new stuff involving Q published in this book. I'm so stoked about 3.0 that everytime i see a possible hint being dropped about it, i go mental.
